title: OverField Music Pack
description: OverField(开放空间) Game Music Pack
body:
## English

This is a music pack for the [ReactiveMusic mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions) with music from the game [OverField](https://nekotan7.com/).

After installation, you should select this pack **in the ReactiveMusic mod** instead of in the resource pack menu.

As an alternative option, you may want to turn on Debug Mode in the mod settings for quick switching (with fade in/out) between music for different environments/conditions.

---

## Chinese (简体中文)

这是一个给 [ReactiveMusic mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions) 用的音乐包，采用了来自 [开放空间](https://nekotan7.com/) 的音乐。

安装资源包后请到 ReactiveMusic mod 的设置中开启本资源包，而不是在游戏的资源包中使用（ReactiveMusic mod 的音乐包作为原版资源包只存在占位提示文本，不具有实际作用）。

如果需要在不同环境之间变换时立刻切换（mod 会带淡入淡出）不同的音乐，请开启 ReactiveMusic mod 的 debug 模式。

---

## 用到的音乐 (List of Music Used)

所有音乐下载自网易云音乐并转码，版权归四川星期零信息科技有限公司和/或网易云音乐所有。

All sounds were downloaded and converted from Netease Cloud Music. Copyright belongs to Sichuan Xingqiling Information Technology Co., Ltd and/or Netease Cloud Music.
